title: Wood-Cutter
description: For When Vanilla Wood Gets Too Boring
body:
Do You Need More Wood?

The Wood-Cutter MOD has got you covered.

This MOD adds multiple new block types so you can proudly display your wood all throughout your builds

It also adds a new Wood-Cutter block to convert planks into new blocks

Three new wood-themed mobs have also been added to give you a hard time in forests

 

MOD Is Currently Available For Version 1.19.2

If you have any bugs, issues or feature requests; please use the issue tracker

REQUIRES GECKOLIB

Textures and Models by Quecko

Coding and Animations by GlitchedMastery

Partnered with BisectHosting:  https://bisecthosting.com/GlitchedMastery

(Use Code: GLITCHEDMASTERY for 25% off!)
